description: Extend the Chinook database schema to support mood tagging. The updated database must include a 'Mood' table (MoodId INTEGER PK, Name VARCHAR(50)) and a 'TrackMood' junction table (TrackId, MoodId, composite PK, Foreign Keys to Track and Mood). The 'Mood' table must contain 'Energetic' (ID 1), 'Focus' (ID 2), and 'Melancholy' (ID 3). Additionally, all 'Rock' tracks must be associated with 'Energetic' and all 'Jazz' tracks with 'Focus' in the 'TrackMood' table. Save the changes to the database file.
